summary: Start from the beginning archive playback Skip through inning markers - Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN the user is entitle for archive game playback
AND Hide Spoilers is turned OFF
AND the archive game does contain a resume bookmark anytime after the top of the 1st inning

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects "Start From The Beginning" to initiate archive game playback
AND the user opens the scrubber/player controls
AND the user selects each top and bottom inning in the line score
steps.result:
THEN a tile with text and thumbnails display for each milestone
AND the playback head jumps to the appropriateinning marker
AND the game playback point matches the inning marker
